verse.name: v1
verse.lines: One day I'm thinking of your word Of what the prophet has been told Just beyond this road There is a better world Where I can live with you My Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: As I began to understand The great redemption and your plan As I look beyond there is a better land Where you will hold my hand as we stand.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: King and Queen that's wo we are, In a world that's not so far. Beyond the curtain of time Our joys will be beyond sublime We will bid this world goodbye No more sickness, No more cry There will never more die No more tears will dim our eyes.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And we shall see Him face to face While enjoying all His grace Just beyond this race I saw a better place Till all the wrong will cease all will be peace…
